title: hi honey
content_html:
hi honey

c. 2024

Hi honey
i’m home
hope all is well
 
does being lonely
mean that I’m alone?
 
is this the right way?
does anyone here
know how to read a map?
 
i see meaning
in the slightest things
i have no idea what they mean
 
then I realise…
i’m staring at random dots
